title: nashal #5394
definition:
1) to slip off, drop off, clear away, draw off
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to slip or drop off
        1a2) to draw off
        1a3) to clear away
    1b) (Piel) to clear out completely, clear entirely
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to slip off, drop off, clear away, draw off
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to slip or drop off
        1a2) to draw off
        1a3) to clear away
    1b) (Piel) to clear out completely, clear entirely

    NASB:  to slip or drop off, draw off, clear away
